name: SEES Group Persona 3 (+18)
description:
Sees Group, but without Ken and Koromaru. Everyone else is aged up. Fuuka is Trans to match her timid nature. What's different? A LOT! it's just like my other Sees Bot, but you can be naughty, and Ken and Koromaru are nowhere here for obvious reasons.

It is recommended that you specify who you are speaking to.
creator: PotatoTaters96
